name: Coze
description: Coze — No-code AI bot creation platform by ByteDance for building and publishing LLM-powered assistants and agents.

seo.title: Coze — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Coze: Coze — No-code AI bot creation platform by ByteDance for building and publishing LLM-powered assistants and agents.

when_to_use: Building and publishing multi-platform AI bots without code
Connecting LLM bots to external tools via plugin integrations
Deploying conversational agents to Discord, Telegram, or WeChat
Prototyping agentic workflows with drag-and-drop node editor

pros: No-code bot builder with plugin marketplace
cons: Feature gaps between China and global versions
review.verdict: Fine for hobbyists and APAC teams; Western enterprises should prefer code-first agent stacks.
review.best_for: APAC creators building social-channel bots without writing code
review.not_for: Western enterprises with GDPR or data residency constraints

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
